Container.Name: AIOMetadata
Container.Overview: AIOMetadata is a Stremio metadata addon. Redis is required for caching; SQLite (default) or PostgreSQL for storage. Most options (API keys, providers, catalogs, passwords) are set in the /configure web UI and stored in the database—not as container variables.
Container.Requires: Redis is required. Point REDIS_URL at your Redis instance (e.g. redis://container-name:6379 on a custom network, or redis://your-server-ip:6379). Set HOST_NAME to the public URL Stremio will use (HTTPS via reverse proxy is typical). After the container is up, open /configure to set TMDB and other API keys, providers, and security options. Optional env overrides (TMDB_API, LOG_LEVEL, OAuth redirects, cache tuning, etc.) are documented here: https://github.com/cedya77/aiometadata/blob/dev/docs/ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.md — add them via "Add another Path, Port, Variable, Label or Device" if you need them.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the addon (container listens on 3232).

Config.Name: Data Folder
Config.Description: Persistent addon data (SQLite DB when using default DATABASE_URI).

Config.Name: Host Name
Config.Description: Public URL where the addon is reachable (include https://). Used for manifest and resource URLs.

Config.Name: Database URI
Config.Description: SQLite default matches the Data Folder mount. Use postgresql://... for Postgres.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis URL for caching. Change host if your Redis container is not named redis.
